failedAssertions.reason: Dedicated xcodebuild validation for testPerRequestSamplerIndependentBehavior crashed with `Fatal error: [concatenate] Axis 0 is out of bounds for array with 0 dimensions`.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that batch-engine sampler assertions should use targeted xcodebuild invocations because broader combined sampler runs can crash in the MLX concatenate path.
